title: AdminGUI
description: AdminGUI is a lightweight administrative plugin that provides server staff with an easy-to-use graphical interface (GUI) no fancy dependencies or anything. its custom made.
body:
🔧 Core Features:
Graphical Admin Menu: Accessible via command /admingui

Teleport to Player: Instantly teleport to online players

Kick / Ban Players: Issue disciplinary actions via button click

View Player Inventory: Open and inspect another player’s inventory

Gamemode Switching: Change your or others' gamemode via GUI

Heal / Feed Players: Instantly restore health and hunger

Vanish Mode: COMING SOON!!!

Broadcast Messages: NEXT UPDATE
